High Put/Open Interest ratio and bearish skew indicate downside protection, but positive Total GEX suggests Market Makers will suppress volatility, keeping prices range-bound near the 677.5 Gamma Flip.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility due to positive GEX environment, but directional breakout likely near gamma flip equilibrium. Expect contained moves with magnetic pull toward max pain.
outlook.summary: Market positioned at critical gamma flip (607.5) inflection point - spot at 607.77 is essentially at dealer equilibrium. Positive total GEX (1.74B combined) indicates dealers are long gamma, suppressing volatility and supporting prices. Monthly max pain at 605 acts as magnetic pull within 0.5% of spot. Major structural resistance at 620 (resonance across ALL three expiries), key support at 590 (weekly+monthly confluence). Bearish skew in short-term (ratio 3.16) suggests aggressive put hedging, while extremely low 0DTE PCR (0.46) indicates potential complacency risk. High volume/OI ratios in 610-614 zone signal intense intraday activity.

levels.motivazione: Critical equilibrium where cumulative gamma shifts sign. Spot at 607.77 sits directly on this inflection point. Dealers are gamma-neutral here - high probability of directional resolution. Confluence of 0DTE and WEEKLY gamma flip levels.

RESONANCE level - significant CALL OI across ALL three expiries (0DTE: 9977, WEEKLY: 6156, MONTHLY: 34683). Structural ceiling with concentrated dealer short delta. Break above requires substantial buying pressure.
CONFLUENCE support with massive put OI concentration in WEEKLY (11273) and MONTHLY (98790 - largest single strike). Institutional hedging zone where dealers provide support via delta hedging.
Monthly max pain within 0.5% of current spot. Market maker target zone creating magnetic attraction. Combined with positive GEX, price tends to stabilize near this level through expiry.
CONFLUENCE secondary resistance with dominant CALL OI in WEEKLY (23002) and MONTHLY (47269). Upper bound cap for bullish scenarios. Dealer selling pressure expected on approaches.
Monthly major support with 91363 put OI - second largest strike. Psychological round number with heavy institutional positioning. Dealer delta-hedging creates buying pressure.
FRICTION zone with extreme volume/OI ratios in 0DTE (54862 vol / 9461 OI = 5.8x). Mixed call/put interest creates choppy price action. Unusual activity suggests institutional repositioning.
